overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game showing a character with a large backpack traversing a snowy mountain pass at night. The character walks along a winding path through open mountain terrain and briefly passes through a dark rocky cave before emerging back into the open valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ridge path with valley overlook

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy mountain ridge path carrying a large backpack

entered.detail: steep snow-covered mountain slope rising on the left side
dark rocky cliff wall adjacent to the path
wide open valley covered in snow extending to the horizon
snow-capped mountain range visible in the distance
winding trail through the snow with visible footprints

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open snowy mountain ridge with a steep cliff face on the left and a wide snow-covered valley visible to the right. The path winds through the mountains under a dark overcast night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain path approaching rocky cave entrance

events.description: approaching dark rocky cave entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the path curves toward a dark rocky outcrop

entered.detail: large dark rock outcrop forming a cave entrance ahead
snow-covered mountain ridge extending along the left side

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the winding path as the terrain shifts to approach a dark rocky cave entrance. The valley remains visible to the right while the mountain ridge extends ahead.

events.description: exiting cave back to open mountain terrain

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark enclosed cave passage with rock walls close on both sides

entered.detail: overhanging rock ceiling completely obscuring the sky
dark rocky wall close to the path on the right
rocky cave mouth marking the transition into the enclosed space

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow dark cave passage where the sky is completely obscured by rock overhead. The path continues through the enclosed rocky tunnel before emerging back into the open.

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding snowy path through the open mountain valley

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered mountain range visible ahead
narrow mountain pass opening to the valley beyond
jagged rock formation protruding from the snow on the left

segments.scene_description: Exiting the cave, the character returns to the open mountain valley with snow-covered peaks visible in the distance. The path continues winding through the expansive snowy landscape under the dark night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain ridge that briefly plunges into a dark cavern before returning to an expansive alpine valley. It begins with the character traversing a winding path between a steep cliff face and a wide, snow-covered valley under a dark overcast sky. As the character continues forward, the open terrain shifts toward a rocky outcrop, leading the camera directly into the mouth of a narrow cave. The scene then transitions into an enclosed rocky tunnel where the sky is completely obscured, before the path opens up once more. Finally, the camera emerges from the darkness to reveal a vast landscape of distant snow-covered peaks under the night sky.
